documentation.description:
A fence point. Used to set a point when from GCS -> MAV. Also used to
return a point from MAV -> GCS.

record_types.name: Fence_Point

fields.name: Idx
fields.description: Point index (first point is 1, 0 is for return point).

fields.name: Count
fields.description: Total number of points (for sanity checking).

   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid
